---
title: "lookup_franchise"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_franchise()`

Lookup Franchise IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_franchise(
  franchise_title,
  silent = getOption("flixpatrol.silent", FALSE)
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `franchise_title` | Character vector. The title(s) of the franchises to lookup. |
| `silent` | Logical. If 'FALSE' (default), prints success messages using 'cli'. |

## Value

A named character vector of franchise IDs.

## Description

Translates human-readable franchise titles (e.g., "Indiana Jones", "Marvel")
into FlixPatrol internal franchise IDs.

## Details

This function queries the '/franchises' endpoint using exact matching. It is
vectorized via 'purrr::map_chr', allowing you to search for multiple franchises
at once.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
lookup_franchise("Indiana Jones")
# [1] "frn_STNa2GEw54ahWxJsXNgBMmt0"

## End(Not run)
```
